top-nav: padding: 48px 16px 0; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between;
x-logo: font-size: 22px; font-weight: 700; color: var(--text); font-family: Georgia, serif; transform: scaleX(0.9);
filter-bar: display: flex; padding: 10px 0 0; border-bottom: 1px solid var(--divider);
filter-tab: flex: 1; text-align: center; padding: 12px 0; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 700; color: var(--text-secondary); position: relative;
post: display: flex; padding: 12px 16px; gap: 12px; border-bottom: 1px solid var(--divider);
post-avatar: width: 40px; height: 40px; border-radius: 50%; background: linear-gradient(135deg, #F5A623, #D0021B); flex-shrink: 0;
post-head: display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 4px; font-size: 14px;
post-media: aspect-ratio: 16/10; border-radius: 16px; background: linear-gradient(135deg, #1E3A5F 0%, #2B5CB8 50%, #6B9FD1 100%); margin-bottom: 10px; position: relative; overflow: hidden;
post-actions: display: flex; justify-content: space-between; color: var(--text-secondary); font-size: 12px; margin-top: 6px;
tab: display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; color: var(--text-secondary);
